children.text: Dogs Allowed: We welcome 2 pets per apartment home. There is a $500 additional security deposit for pets. Pet rent is $50 for dogs and $35 for cats. There is not a weight limit for dogs, but we have a restricted breed policy that includes any aggressive breeds. All pets must be approved in advance by management.

Cats Allowed: We welcome 2 pets per apartment home. There is a $500 additional security deposit for pets. Pet rent is $50 for dogs and $35 for cats. There is not a weight limit for dogs, but we have a restricted breed policy that includes any aggressive breeds. All pets must be approved in advance by management.
